Info

Defines abstract class ISplasher with method(s). Interface for splash screen component.

class ats_utilities.splasher.isplasher.ISplasher[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Defines abstract class ISplasher with method(s). Interface for splash screen component.

It defines:

attributes:

None

methods:
get_shared_context - Returns the shared context.
center - Centers console line.
is_initialized - Checks if splasher component is initialized.
__str__ - Returns the splash screen component as string representation.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract center(splash_center_bundle: SplashCenterBundle | None = None) → None[source]¶

Centers console line.

Parameters:

splash_center_bundle (<SplashCenterBundle | None>) – Splash center bundle for centering console output | None.

Exceptions:

None.

abstract get_shared_context() → ContextBundle | None[source]¶

Returns the shared context.

Returns:

Shared context | None.

Return type:

<ContextBundle | None>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract is_initialized() → bool[source]¶

Checks if splasher component is initialized.

Returns:

True (success) | False (fail)

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.
